sentiment.reasoning: A 12% margin improvement directly translates to higher profitability and is a strong positive signal for investors.

headlines.headline: Holtar Stores signs multi-year partnership with a multinational manufacturer

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
